chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-368 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections For orders on M.A. 2158/2020 For hearing of main case 28.11.2024 No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioners and no intimation has been received. This matter has been pending since 11.03.2020 without having been properly pursued. From the perusal of the matter specifically para 10 of the pleadings, it appears that the petitioners are seeking their appointment in the Public Health Engineering Department on the basis of having donated a plot. Such a plea does not constitute proper cause for appointment, as has already been held by a learned Division Bench of this Court in C.P. No.D-491 of 2018. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly along with the pending Miscellaneous Application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
